title: Record a media/web zero-config readiness contract
prompt: Create reports/media-web-zero-config-contract.md with sections for Image keys, Video keys, WebSearch fallback, and /status readiness.

fixtureActions.content:
# Media/Web Zero-Config Contract

## Image keys
OPENAI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY/GEMINI_API_KEY enables GenerateImage without MCP

## Video keys
GOOGLE_API_KEY/GEMINI_API_KEY enables GenerateVideo without MCP

## WebSearch fallback
no-subscription local search provider when managed search is not configured

## /status readiness
/status shows Research, Media, Bench, and Privacy/ZDR gates for beginners
